top_signals.title: Ukraine launches ‘TrophyLab’ platform to share captured Russian weapons with allies
top_signals.summary: Among the listed items available for study are, for example, a Kinzhal hypersonic missile and a T-90M tank.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mexico Raises $6.3 Billion in New Bonds to Fund Buyback
top_signals.summary: Mexico raised $6.3 billion in bonds to fund a buyback of its existing debt as credit-rating firms warn over the nation’s widening fiscal deficit, raising concerns over its investment-grade status.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX sheds $400bn in market value as debut rally hits reverse
top_signals.summary: Shares in Elon Musk’s AI and rockets group tumble more than 16% following fresh rise in US bond yields
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cotopaxi CEO: Luggage a ‘Natural Extension’ for Brand
top_signals.summary: Lindsay Shumlas, CEO of Cotopaxi, discusses the company's recent expansion from backpacks into the luggage market with the launch of their new Coraza luggage line. The product, introduced about two months ago, emphasizes sustainability and durability through a repair-led model, contrasting with the typical replacement-focused luggage industry. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
